_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for G.I. Joe: Renegades (2010-2011) — modernized animated series with A-Team fugitive premise

data.name: Duke (Renegades)
data.description: Young clean-cut soldier in green military jacket over white t-shirt with dog tags. Athletic build with blond hair in modern short style. On-the-run fugitive look mixing civilian and military clothing. Natural leader of the renegade squad

data.name: Scarlett (Renegades)
data.description: Athletic young woman in dark tactical top with red hair in practical ponytail. Modern animated design with clean lines and realistic proportions. Armed with crossbow. Undercover military intelligence agent embedded with the renegade squad

data.name: Snake Eyes (Renegades)
data.description: Silent ninja in sleek black bodysuit with modern tactical visor. Lean muscular build with clean animated design. Carries katana and compact modern weapons. Mysterious loner who assists the renegades. Accompanied by wolf Timber

data.name: Tunnel Rat (Renegades)
data.description: Asian American young man in green hoodie and cargo pants with goggles around neck. Wiry build with modern street-smart appearance. Team's tech and demolitions expert mixing civilian clothes with military utility gear

data.name: Roadblock (Renegades)
data.description: Large African American soldier in olive tank top and military cargo pants. Massive muscular build with shaved head and goatee. Carries heavy weapons and serves as team heavy muscle. A-Team aesthetic with civilian-military hybrid clothing

data.name: Cobra Commander (Renegades)
data.description: Corporate businessman Adam DeCobray in expensive dark suit before transformation. Later dons blue hooded robe and chrome face plate. Slim build with calculating demeanor. Cobra Industries CEO using legitimate business as front for weapons dealing

data.name: Baroness (Renegades)
data.description: Cobra Industries executive in dark business suit with signature glasses and long black hair in modern style. Slim athletic build with corporate elegance hiding combat skills. Serves as Cobra Commander's chief operative under corporate cover

data.name: Destro (Renegades)
data.description: Scottish arms manufacturer in dark business attire with silver metal mask covering disfigured face. Broad-shouldered build with refined demeanor. M.A.R.S. Industries CEO operating as Cobra's weapons supplier. Modern corporate villain aesthetic

data.name: Storm Shadow (Renegades)
data.description: Ninja assassin in white modern tactical suit with clean animated design. Athletic build with white hair and exposed face. Cobra's top enforcer and Snake Eyes' rival from the Arashikage clan. Sleek, contemporary ninja aesthetic

data.name: Dr. Mindbender (Renegades)
data.description: Cobra Industries chief scientist in white lab coat over dark clothing with round glasses. Slim build with dark hair and goatee. Modern reimagining as corporate bio-weapons researcher rather than bare-chested villain. Intellectual and morally bankrupt

data.name: Zartan (Renegades)
data.description: Master of disguise in dark leather jacket and jeans with shifting facial features. Medium athletic build with hood and modern biker aesthetic. Uses advanced holographic technology for disguises rather than supernatural abilities

data.name: Major Bludd (Renegades)
data.description: Australian mercenary in dark tactical gear with eye patch and cybernetic arm. Grizzled stocky build with modern military contractor look. Hired gun working for Cobra Industries as deniable asset

data.name: Tomax (Renegades)
data.description: Corporate executive twin in dark business suit with slicked-back dark hair. Slim athletic build with polished appearance. Cobra Industries executive using Extensive Enterprises as corporate front. Twin telepathic link with Xamot

data.name: Xamot (Renegades)
data.description: Corporate executive twin in dark business suit with slicked-back dark hair and facial scar. Mirror image of Tomax with slim athletic build. Cobra Industries executive sharing telepathic link with twin brother

data.name: Scrap-Iron (Renegades)
data.description: Cobra weapons engineer in dark tactical uniform with protective goggles and heavy gloves. Stocky build with industrial aesthetic. Designs and tests anti-armor weapons for Cobra Industries. Modern military-industrial complex villain

data.name: Firefly (Renegades)
data.description: Saboteur in dark gray tactical suit with glowing orange visor mask. Medium build with stealth-oriented design carrying incendiary devices. Cobra's demolitions expert with modernized high-tech sabotage equipment

data.name: Flint (Renegades)
data.description: Military officer in olive dress uniform with black beret. Clean-cut athletic build with strong jawline. Initially pursues the renegades as a by-the-book officer before discovering the truth about Cobra. Modern military design

data.name: Lady Jaye (Renegades)
data.description: Military intelligence officer in dark olive tactical uniform with auburn hair in short modern cut. Athletic build with javelin weapon and modern combat gear. Works alongside Flint investigating the renegades

data.name: General Hawk (Renegades)
data.description: Senior military commander in dark green dress uniform with general's stars. Older distinguished build with gray hair and authoritative bearing. Secretly believes the renegades and works to expose Cobra from within the system

data.name: Shipwreck (Renegades)
data.description: Navy sailor in blue peacoat over civilian clothes with sailor cap and dark beard. Stocky build with nautical aesthetic. Supporting character who aids the renegades. Modern everyman sailor design

data.name: Airtight (Renegades)
data.description: Hazmat and chemical defense specialist in yellow protective suit with gas mask and containment equipment. Average build with modern CBRN specialist design. Supporting character providing chemical weapons expertise

data.name: Law & Order (Renegades)
data.description: Military police officer in dark blue MP uniform with K-9 partner Order. Athletic build with modern law enforcement aesthetic. Pursues the renegades before learning the truth. Clean-cut professional design

data.name: Doc (Renegades)
data.description: Military medic in olive field uniform with red cross armband and medical kit. Average build with glasses and compassionate expression. Modern combat medic design providing medical support to the team
